creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #9)

Thanks Robert. If resolution of this issue depends on (should be committed after), resolution of bug 264431 please add it to this issues 'Depends On' field.

Also if the original patch by adr@ is obsoleted by yours, let us know so we can mark it as such

^Triage: Port is unmaintained, approval set in comment 9 is:

  Approved by: portmgr (blanket: unmaintained port)
